prompt: Create a square, highly detailed cinematic fantasy portrait of a mysterious modern witch standing waist-up inside an antique apothecary and wizard study. The witch has long wavy black hair, a deliberately obscured soft-blurred face with no visible facial features, and wears a tall floppy dark navy-black witch hat decorated with dried lavender, small gold celestial ornaments, moon charms, and delicate lace-like trim. Her outfit is a deep emerald and purple velvet dress under a fitted black coat embroidered with silver constellation lines, zodiac symbols, moons, stars, and occult diagrams, plus a small black crystal pendant necklace. She holds both hands open as if casting a spell, conjuring one continuous luminous ribbon of swirling magic that loops around her hands and across her torso in an S-shaped arc; the magic is iridescent blue, violet, cyan, pink, and gold with sparkling dust, translucent triangular crystal shards, prism refractions, and galaxy-like light trails. The background is a cozy dark wooden magical shop with shelves of glass potion bottles, jars of herbs, crystals, old leather-bound books, dried hanging botanicals, candles, and alchemical objects. On the wall behind her is a large ornate gold-framed painting or portal showing a cosmic nebula sky, stars, and ancient stone ruins in teal-blue light. Foreground bottles are softly blurred with colorful reflections, creating depth of field. Use dramatic warm candlelight mixed with cool magical glow, rich jewel-tone colors, realistic fabric texture, intricate embroidery, sharp details on the hat and coat, volumetric sparkles, shallow depth of field, and a polished GPT-image-2 photoreal fantasy editorial style. Keep exactly one central witch, one continuous magical ribbon, one ornate cosmic framed artwork, and no readable text or watermark.
